zh.lifeSummary: Gillian Draper於大約1565年出生在英國藍卡爾曼徹斯特。她於1586年9月18日與Richard Rothwell結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Gillian Draper于大约1565年出生在英国藍卡爾曼徹斯特。她于1586年9月18日与Richard Rothwell结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Draper
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker and seller of woolen cloth, from Anglo-Norman draper (Old French drapier, an agent derivative of drap ‘cloth’). The surname was introduced to Ulster in the 17th century. Draperstown in County Londonderry was named for the London Company of Drapers, which was allocated the land in the early 17th century.

variants.name: Drape
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Hans, Otto.
English: nickname from Old French drap ‘cloth’, probably used for a draper. See Draper .
German (Lower Saxony): unexplained. This surname is rare in Germany.

nameMeanings.name: Gillian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Julian  , from which it was differentiated in spelling only in the 17th century.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: Gillian Draper was born about 1565, in Manchester, Lancashire, England. She married Richard Rothwell on 18 September 1586. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. She was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Gillian Draper est née environ 1565, à Manchester, Lancashire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Richard Rothwell le 18 septembre 1586. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Elleenterrée à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Gillian Draper wurde um 1565 in Manchester, Lancashire, England geboren. Sie hat am 18. September 1586 Richard Rothwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Gillian Draper è nata il circa 1565 nel Manchester, Lancashire, England. Lei sposato Richard Rothwell il 18 settembre 1586. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie. Fu sepolta a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Gillian Draperは約1565年にイギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスターで生まれた。1586年9月18日にRichard Rothwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gillian Draper(은)는 대략 1565년 영국 랭카실르 먼체스터에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1586년 9월 18일 Richard Rothwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Gillian Draper nasceu aproximadamente 1565, em Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Richard Rothwell em 18 de setembro de 1586. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela foi sepultada em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Gillian Draper родилась около 1565 г. в местности манчестир, ланкашир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Rothwell 18 сентября 1586 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Она была похоронена в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Gillian Draper nació aproximadamente 1565, en Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Richard Rothwell el 18 de septiembre de 1586. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. Fue sepultada en Inglaterra.
